---
name: Bug report
about: Report a replication failure or pipeline error
labels: bug
---

## Paper
DOI or URL of the paper you were replicating:

## Stage where it failed
Which stage (1–5) raised the error? Paste the last 20 lines of the log.

## What you expected
What should the stage have done?

## Environment
- Python version:
- OS:
- Which LLM key (Anthropic / OpenAI):
- Relevant `.env` variables (no values — just key names):

## Reproducible?
Does it fail consistently, or only on this paper?
